challenge.explanation:
Kategorija Personal Workspace daje zaposlenima slobodu da unaprede svoj kućni radni prostor. Mogu koristiti preostali dodatak for nameštaj (poput radnog stola ili stolice) ili dodatne tehnološke nadogradnje.

Obrati pažnju na to kako e-mail Anine organizuje važne radne alate i zahteve privatnog radnog prostora.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Since the remote work stipend was updated, Anna decided to email the team with updates:

Subject: Update on Remote Work Stipend – What's Covered

Hi team,

We've reviewed feedback on how to best use the remote work stipend, and we've decided to offer more flexibility while ensuring everyone has the essentials for remote work.

The stipend will now cover two categories:

1. Essential Equipment – This includes a laptop, webcam, and headset to ensure everyone has the necessary tools to work efficiently.

2. Personal Workspace – Any remaining funds can be used for office furniture or additional tech upgrades based on individual needs.

This way, everyone has the basics covered while still having the freedom to improve their home office setup in the way that works best for them.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out!

Best,

Anna

What can team members use the stipend for under the Personal Workspace category?

answers.answer: Nameštaj za kancelarije ili dodatni tehnički nadogradnje

answers.feedback: E-pošta nije spomenula korišćenje subvencije za putovanje.

answers.answer: Ručkovi tima i članstva za rad u zajedničkom prostoru
answers.feedback: Subvencija je namenjena unapređenju kućnog radnog mesta, a ne za društveno ili vanjsko radno mesto.

answers.answer: Članstva u teretani i programi za blagostanje
answers.feedback: Subvencija je namenjena potrebama daljinskog rada, a ne programima zdravlja i blagostanja.

challenge.title: Vežba 134
